【Day 17】A Language Even Simpler Than Me? The Computer World Only Has 0 and 1!
Code Review of My Youth - From the BIOS Beep to Software Engineering
Think colors and text are complex? In a computer's eyes, it's only 0 and 1. Using game memories and small exercises, this post walks you through the magic of binary.
【Day 10】Lend Me Your USB! I Need to Play Warcraft!

Hit the 4GB limit when copying to USB? Starting from a Warcraft-class memory, this post covers format levels, FAT32 limits, and the differences between NTFS and exFAT — using a story to introduce the basics of file systems.
